inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 adjusted operating earnings per diluted share $39.29; 98.2M diluted shares (Q4 2025 earnings release filed 2026-01-29)
inputs.shares_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares (Q4 2025 earnings release)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses company-adjusted operating earnings, not GAAP operating cash flow ($8.3B FY2025), which includes policyholder account and insurance liability movements. FY2025 return of capital to shareholders was $3.4B (88% of adjusted operating earnings).

bear.notes: Equity market drawdown compresses fee-based revenue; advisor recruiting slows; multiple compression to ~14x owner earnings

base.notes: Client assets +13% FY2025; wrap flows +9%; adjusted operating EPS +14%; advisor productivity +8% to $1.1M TTM

bull.notes: Sustained wrap inflows near 7% annualized rate; asset management margin expansion; continued 80%+ capital return

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Insurance and separate-account assets are marked; equity is thin vs total assets by design (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating wealth and asset management franchise

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Closed Blocks (long-term care, fixed annuities) drag in Corporate & Other; FY2025 LTC AO earnings $28M ex-unlocking (Q4 2025 release)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Fee revenue tied to client assets and transactional activity, not contracted backlog

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private stake SOTP in filings

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: RiverSource annuities and protection products embedded in Advice & Wealth Management and Retirement & Protection flows (10-K)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Fee-based wrap and advisory revenue scales with $1.2T Advice & Wealth Management client assets and $670B wrap platform; Columbia Threadneedle asset management adds institutional and retail flows; spread income from bank and certificate company supplements fees.
growth_explanation.source: Q4 2025 earnings release (SEC exhibit q42025er.htm); 10-K FY2025 segment discussion

notes: Owner cash uses adjusted operating earnings, not GAAP OCF; validate against next company FCF reconciliation
High ROE (53% adjusted) and 88% payout may justify premium multiple; Lawrence model uses conservative 18x year-10 exit
Market sensitivity: fee revenue tied to client asset levels and equity markets
